dataList.content: Meanwhile, Heathcliff's team...
Bloody hell... What's up with these gits? They're showing up out of nowhere!
How should I know? But judging by their getup, they seem like S Corp. fellas.
And things were going so well... We could've talked it out with those fedora guys who were rummaging around the place earlier, you know.
But no, you just had to go barking at them first. Would've saved us a whole lot of trouble if you hadn't, right?
Oh, so it's my fault?
Those bastards looked like they were nickin' stuff! This is our contract area, ain't it? If they walked off with something important, we'd be the ones catching hell!
Listen, bud. Not everyone's itching to swipe hair coupons into their pockets the second they get the chance.
Oh, for—how many bloody months are you lot gonna milk that?!
Um, excuse me~
What, you got a problem too, mate?!
Ahaha... No, not at all.
Just wondering whether that gentleman over there... is also one of our enemies.
Hm? Is that the end of your troupe performance?
Shame. I was really enjoying watching you folks dance! Might've mistaken this place for the Peach Blossom Land of legends had there been a cup of fine <ruby=rice wine>makgeolli</ruby> to go with it.
... Yeah, that's an enemy all right.
Hmm... He has a name tag, though. I think it says, um... "LCD."
LCD or whatever, who gives a toss?! Am I supposed to put up with every bastard havin' a dig at me?!
Oh, dear!
Such— bold— swings! Didn't know there was an encore to that performance! Hah!
You slippery little rat...!
Well, I do find this amusing enough, but if you intend to play with me... You ought to be more aware of your surroundings!
Hey! Behind you! There's...!
*gasp*
Wow~ He took out all those dopo-wearing people with just a single strike!
I'd say that about covers the price of admittance for your troupe circus. Wouldn't you?
Well, then... I leave the rest to you folks. Wandering blades in murim tales never linger on the stage for long, after all!
Oi! Where the hell do you think you're going? Ah, damn it—
